html:
Exclusive to:

The Snazzy Pitchfork is a variant of the normal Pitchfork that has four times as much durability and requires Gold instead of Flint. It requires 2 Gold Nuggets and 4 Twigs to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. Snazzy Pitchfork has 800 uses.

Usage

Once the Snazzy Pitchfork is equipped, a square outline will appear on the ground showing the patch that the cursor is hovering over, along with a prompt. Right-clicking will dig up the outlined terrain, leaving a barren patch in its place. Turf items can only be placed on this sort of barren terrain. 

The Snazzy Pitchfork has 800 uses. It can also be used as a weapon which deals 17 damage but loses 4 times durability per hit (1%). 

Dug up Turf can be replaced with other kinds of Turfs (e.g. Wooden Flooring). This is useful for decoration or for preventing Lureplants and Eyeplants from spawning.

The digging animation for the Pitchfork can be cut short by moving after the player digs up anything. This speeds up the process of mass-clearing turf when holding spacebar.

Skins

Exclusive to:
“Why did I even make a pitchfork this fancy?”
–Wilson
“It won't light the ground on fire, but at least it's shiny.”
–Willow
“Fancy pitchfork good for stab ground.”
–Wolfgang
“One might as well till fields with style.”
–Wendy
“GOLD IS *MORE* DURABLE?”
–WX-78
“The most malleable of metals, but let's see how this tills.”
–Wickerbottom
“Welp. I can't unmake it, so...”
–Woodie
“I'm not sure this was a good investment.”
–Maxwell
“A weapön öf very wealthy farmers.”
–Wigfrid
“We can do some fancy forking with this.”
–Webber
“A golden fork for a giant, oui?”
–Warly
“Pretty Ground Getter”
–Wormwood
“I mean why not, hey?”
–Winona
“Fancy mob gear. Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“For fancy farming, florp.”
–Wurt
“Now I can be part of a FANCY angry mob.”
–Walter
“I wouldn't want that gold to go to waste.”
–Wanda
The Snazzy Pitchfork is a variant of the normal Pitchfork that has four times as much durability and requires Gold instead of Flint. It requires 2 Gold Nuggets and 4 Twigs to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. Snazzy Pitchfork has 800 uses.

Once the Snazzy Pitchfork is equipped, a square outline will appear on the ground showing the patch that the cursor is hovering over, along with a prompt. The Snazzy Pitchfork has 800 uses. It can also be used as a weapon which deals 17 damage but loses 4 times durability per hit (1%).
Dug up Turf can be replaced with other kinds of Turfs (e.g. Wooden Flooring). This is useful for decoration or for preventing Lureplants and Eyeplants from spawning.
The digging animation for the Pitchfork can be cut short by moving after the player digs up anything. This speeds up the process of mass-clearing turf when holding spacebar.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Chĩa Snazzy là một biến thể của Chĩa bình thường có độ bền gấp bốn lần và yêu cầu Vàng thay vì Đá lửa. Nó cần 2 Vàng Thỏi và 4 Cành Cây để chế tạo và cần Máy Luyện Kim để nguyên mẫu. Snazzy Pitchfork có 800 công dụng.
